editor_settings.title: MSI RTX 4090 Suprim X vs Suprim Liquid X: Which Should You Buy?
editor_settings.content:
MSI RTX 4090 Suprim X vs Suprim Liquid X: Which Should You Buy?

The MSI Suprim X is the safer choice.

The Suprim Liquid X is the cooler choice.

That sounds like a joke, but it is the whole buying decision.

Quick Verdict

Buy the MSI RTX 4090 Suprim X if you want a premium air-cooled card with less setup drama.

Buy the MSI RTX 4090 Suprim Liquid X if your case has radiator space and you specifically want liquid cooling.

Most people should buy the air-cooled Suprim X.

Why The Suprim X Makes More Sense

The RTX 4090 is already a big, power-hungry flagship.

A strong air cooler is usually enough if your case has proper airflow. The Suprim X gives you premium build quality without adding a pump, tubes, radiator placement, or long-term liquid-cooling worries.

That boring simplicity matters.

Where The Suprim Liquid X Wins

The Liquid X can be excellent in the right build.

If your case has weak direct GPU airflow but good radiator mounting, liquid cooling can make sense. It can also help keep the card visually cleaner inside the case because the GPU body is smaller than giant air-cooled cards.

But it is not free. You need radiator space, cable planning, and comfort with an AIO-style GPU cooler.

Performance Difference

Do not expect a totally different GPU.

Both are RTX 4090 cards with 24GB of GDDR6X. In normal gaming, the difference is usually thermals, noise, boost behavior, and build experience, not a magical new tier of performance.

If the Liquid X costs much more, ask yourself what problem it is solving.

Which One Should You Avoid?

Avoid the Liquid X if your case fit is uncertain.

Avoid either card if the seller cannot show good photos, proof of working condition, and the power connector area.

Used RTX 4090 listings are too expensive to buy on trust alone.

Final Verdict

The MSI RTX 4090 Suprim X is the better default buy.

The Suprim Liquid X is for people who already know where the radiator will go and why they want liquid cooling.

If you are unsure, that is your answer: buy the air-cooled Suprim X or choose another clean RTX 4090 at a better price.
